goal: Expose state graph DeepSeek cache event, model, hit/miss token, ratio, and relation metadata as machine-readable JSON without scraping the human cache report.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures validate --suite local-smoke
hidden_failure_mode: Graph cache reports include DeepSeek cache hit/miss metrics and relation provenance, but CI and release scripts must parse human text to assert cache layout quality.
